title: CORE — Identification/Dates
description: Identifiers and record timing for one participant at one questionnaire / record cycle.

id.title: Individual ID (original from study)
id.description: Study-specific person ID as supplied by the originating cohort.

qcycle.title: Questionnaire cycle (repeated measures)
qcycle.$comment: Source coding: 0 - Baseline; 1+ - Follow up cycle #; 888 - Missing. Open-ended count, not a closed enum.

anyOf.description: 0 = baseline; positive integer = follow-up cycle number.

baseline.title: Baseline record indicator
baseline.$comment: Source coding: 0 - Record taken subsequent to baseline; 1 - Record taken at baseline.
